description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular mobile phone with a sleek black and dark gray exterior. The front features a large glass touchscreen display with a thin bezel, a circular home button at the bottom, and a speaker grille at the top. The back is metallic with a matte finish, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center and a small camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are slim and house several physical buttons, including volume controls and a mute switch on the left edge. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass, aluminum, and plastic, giving it a modern and premium look. Its overall design is minimalist, with smooth edges and a flat profile.
description: A sleek, black and gray mobile phone with a glass touchscreen front, metallic back, and slim side buttons. Features a prominent Apple logo and a single rear camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass touchscreen display, home button, and top speaker grille.
description_view_1: Right edge view displaying the slim profile with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the metallic surface, silver Apple logo, and rear camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Left edge view showing the volume buttons and mute switch.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly visible against the matte dark gray surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue and green cosmic or nebula-themed wallpaper with small white stars, and a status bar at the top showing time, signal, and battery icons. No app icons or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A single small camera lens with an adjacent flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons include a circular home button below the screen on the front, and on the left edge, two round volume buttons and a small mute switch. No buttons are visible on the right edge.
